title: Abomination
description: A creepypasta based mod with some other inspirations
body:
WARNING NOT FOR PEOPLE WITH HEART PROBLEMS, AS IT INCLUDES JUMPSCARES

 

A mod based on a Minecraft creepypasta that is also inspired by cave dweller and some other things.

 
I've made a discord server where you can leave suggestions, report bugs, or just chill: https://discord.com/invite/XYxTPjqMHb (fixed link)

 

Chase music: Apotheosis - Kevin MacLeod

Boss music(new): Rising Sun - NemesisTheory

Boss music(old): Broken Heart of Ender - Peter Hont

 

Has tons of abilities so do not underestimate it, for more detail I just recommend watching the video as it goes more in depth even having a demo.

 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GMWN-9wvWxU

Boss battle demo:

 
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CUoKIOANIIs
 

Basically all you need to know is that it attempts to match the player's speed and could attack if it catches you staring in it's direction, but those are only 2 abilities out of 11 so don't die.

 

Has a chance to come for you upon spawning without having to aggravate it after a configurable delay

 

Can spawn in forests during daytime

 

Only one entity may be present at a time

 

has quite a few config options, comment on what options and features should I add in the future.

 

Four structures included(diced tree variants, and a netherrack pillar)


Boss Altar resides at -666 64 -666 place ancient debris on the quartz pillar to activate

Place ancient debris on a complete altar to activate
 
Boss battle tips:

-if you hear digging noises then immediately crouch to avoid being trapped

-if you hear an end portal opening sound then block with a shield while pointing at the sky, can be a few degrees off(-70>x) to avoid being zapped by lightning and risk having to deal with 2 - 4 charged creepers

-if you see critical strike particles and hear repetitive noises then get out of the particle area

 
Weapon stats:

all i'm gonna say is that it is really powerful and you need to hold alt key and right click to activate secondary ability. have fun trolling your friends or something idk :)

 
Implant stats:

They say two is better than one which in this case doesn't apply because the first weapon already holds tremendous power but then I thought If I had a weapon why not make a piece of armor, hence this item exists, press armor 1 or 2 keys for primary abilities, and armor 1 or 2 + alt for  secondary. gives some effects if the armor piece is worn while the weapon is wielded.

 
Implant recipe/altar:
key:

a - ancient debris

r - redstone block

e - emerald block

 

r a  r

a e a

r a  r

 

Place a beacon on top of the emerald block and shift + right click it with the weapon dropped by the boss

 

Check out my Channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCGAju7IexNSArXc30gR7NNg

 
Requires Geckolib
 
Made on schedule thanks to Mcreator

Trivia:
1.  That thing's texture was made by Raygloom/Ray_savage who makes videos about minecraft  
          creepypastas. https://www.youtube.com/@RayGloomCreepypasta
2. The weapon dropped by that thing is inspired by a weapon from pixel gun 3d used by the monster in
          monster hunting minigame
3.  more stuff coming soon...
